subject_information.address: 230 Tiffany Mountain Suite 863, South Michael, KY 25205

suspicious_activity.narrative: Michael Stanley, DOB 1978-07-24, operational investment banker, exhibited suspicious activity from 2025-02-03 to 2025-08-01. Despite an annual income of $128,868, his accounts showed $380,633.78 in transactions, including a $98,090.16 wire credit on 2025-07-27 and multiple large wire debits totaling $71,182.08 on 2025-07-28 and 2025-07-29. These transactions suggest possible money laundering through layering, given the high volume and rapid fund movement. Accounts involved: CUST_0062_ACC_1 and CUST_0062_ACC_3. Activity occurred across various branches and electronic platforms. Filed under BSA 31 CFR 1020.320 and 12 CFR 21.11.
suspicious_activity.ai_reasoning: Customer's income is $128,868, but the account shows high transaction volumes and large wire transfers. Rapid movement of funds with multiple outgoing wire transfers in a short period suggests layering. No transactions just below $10,000, reducing structuring suspicion.
